title: Future Leaders Internship Program
description: Merit Advisory's Future Leaders Internship Program is a fully-funded, 6-month structured program designed to develop the next generation of professional talent in Somalia. Interns gain hands-on experience in Odoo ERP systems, software engineering, and financial advisory — at zero cost.
responsibilities: Work on real client projects under senior consultant supervision
Attend weekly mentoring sessions and skill-development workshops
Produce professional deliverables including reports, configurations, and code
Participate in team meetings, client presentations, and internal reviews
Complete assigned track curriculum and self-learning modules
Submit weekly progress reflections and learning journals
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field
Fresh graduate or up to 2 years post-graduation experience
Strong motivation to learn, grow, and contribute to real projects
Basic computer proficiency; experience with Microsoft Office or Google Workspace
Proficiency in Somali language required; English is an advantage
Availability for minimum 4 days per week in a hybrid format
Willingness to collaborate, take initiative, and receive constructive feedback
Accounting, IFRS, Odoo ERP, Python, React, financial modeling

process.description: Complete the online application form and upload your CV and motivation statement.
Our team reviews all applications. Shortlisted candidates are contacted within 5 business days.
A short conversation to understand your goals and confirm track alignment.
Kick-off with tools setup, team orientation, culture workshop, and learning roadmap creation.
Active project work, weekly mentoring, skill workshops, and continuous learning on your chosen track.
Final capstone presentation, performance evaluation, certificate ceremony, and Merit Advisory membership activation.

title: Functional Consultant [Odoo]
description: We are looking for a motivated and skilled professional candidate to join our team as an Odoo Functional Consultant / Project Manager. The selected candidate will be responsible for demonstrating Odoo solutions to potential clients, managing implementation projects, and providing continuous support.
responsibilities: Present Demos to new leads
Solely manage and oversee projects, including all implementation tasks
Provide on-site and remote training to clients
Setup system defaults, data migration, and overall implementation
Provide comprehensive functional support to clients
Verify accuracy and integrity of data entered into the system
Participate in fiscal year closing processes
Generate reports tailored to customer requirements
Assess and check the quality of customizations
requirements: Strong English proficiency (Speaking) is required
Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Business Administration, Information Systems, or related field
Previous Odoo experience (implementation, configuration, or support) is a strong plus
Understanding of ERP systems, business workflows, and process mapping
Ability to translate business needs into functional specifications
Familiarity with modules such as Accounting, Sales, Inventory, Purchasing, HR
Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines
Strong communication and client-facing skills

process.description: We review your profile to ensure alignment with our requirements.
A brief conversation to discuss your experience and expectations.
Technical and cultural fit assessment with the leadership team.
Practical test to assess your functional knowledge and problem-solving skills.
Usually issued within 7 days after the interview.

title: Senior ERP Project Manager
description: We are seeking an experienced Project Manager to lead large-scale ERP implementation projects for our enterprise clients. You will be responsible for the entire project lifecycle, from planning to go-live, ensuring that all business requirements are met with precision.
responsibilities: Define project scope, goals, and deliverables in collaboration with stakeholders
Lead and coordinate cross-functional project teams including consultants and developers
Manage project budget, resource allocation, and timelines using Agile methodologies
Maintain consistent stakeholder communication and executive reporting
Identify and mitigate project risks before they impact delivery
Ensure rigorous quality standards are met throughout the project lifecycle
Facilitate change management and user adoption strategies
Oversee post-go-live support and project closure activities
requirements: PMP, Prince2, or equivalent project management certification is highly desirable
Minimum 5 years of experience in ERP project management (SAP, Oracle, Odoo, or MS Dynamics)
Strong leadership skills with the ability to motivate and guide technical teams
Experience in the full Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC)
Excellent problem-solving, negotiation, and conflict-resolution abilities
Fluency in English and Somali (written and spoken)
Strong analytical skills for business process optimization

process.description: Review of management experience and certifications.
Presentation of a previous project management scenario.
Interview with senior partners and stakeholders.

title: Full Stack Developer (Python/React)
description: Join our technology team to build and maintain custom extensions and integrations for enterprise systems. You will work on cutting-edge technologies to solve complex business problems and build scalable software solutions.
responsibilities: Develop custom Odoo modules and integrations using Python and the Odoo framework
Build modern, responsive frontend interfaces using React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS
Optimize database queries and system performance for high-traffic environments
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following best practices
Collaborate with functional consultants to translate business needs into technical designs
Implement automated testing and CI/CD pipelines
Perform code reviews and mentor junior developers
requirements: Proficiency in Python and JavaScript (React/Next.js)
Strong experience with PostgreSQL and database design principles
Deep knowledge of RESTful APIs, Webhooks, and integration patterns
Familiarity with Git, Docker, and Linux environments
Passion for building scalable enterprise software and complex business logic
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related technical field
Experience with Odoo development is a major advantage

process.description: Code review of your portfolio or GitHub repositories.
Live coding or deep-dive architectural discussion.
Team discussion to assess collaboration skills.
Meeting with the CTO for final evaluation.
